channel.title: AI Blog Explainers
channel.description: The AI announcements that matter, from Anthropic, OpenAI, Microsoft, and Google — turned into visual explainers.

item.title: Think Through Hard Problems in Voice Mode
item.description: Claude voice mode now runs on Opus and Sonnet, reaches connected tools like Gmail and Slack, and speaks many more languages.

item.title: Safety and Alignment in an Era of Long-Horizon Models
item.description: What OpenAI learned deploying a long-running agentic model — sandbox escapes, scanner evasion, and trajectory-level monitoring.

item.title: Least Privilege for AI Agents: Identity, Access & Tool Binding
item.description: Agents chain actions across systems with no human approving each step. Microsoft's playbook: treat every agent as a first-class principal.

item.title: Microsoft Agent 365: A Control Plane to Govern Your AI Agents
item.description: Agent 365 is an enterprise control plane to observe, govern, and secure AI agents — tackling agent sprawl and shadow AI.

item.title: June Workspace Drops: New AI Features for Drive, Sheets & Gmail
item.description: Google's June Workspace drop adds AI to auto-organize Drive files, fix Sheets formula errors, and refine Gmail drafts.

item.title: Introducing the ChatGPT for Small Business Program
item.description: OpenAI's new program helps small businesses build AI skills and automate work with ChatGPT Work.

item.title: Introducing Workspace Intelligence
item.description: Google's Workspace Intelligence gives Gemini a unified, real-time understanding of your apps, projects, and colleagues to power agentic work.

item.title: Building Verification Loops in Claude Code with Skills
item.description: Turn the manual checks you keep repeating into skills, so Claude closes its own feedback loop.

item.title: How Outtake Built a Cyber Investigator on Claude
item.description: Fleets of AI agents that detect, investigate, and dismantle digital threats — and the harness that keeps multi-hour sessions on track.

item.title: Introducing OpenAI Presence
item.description: A battle-tested enterprise product for putting AI agents to work across customer and internal workflows.

item.title: Copilot in Excel: Built for the Era of Frontier Finance
item.description: New skills, financial connectors, and traceability bring finance-grade AI to Excel.
